channel.title: barefoot___wanderer
channel.description: DIY 🪚 Building my own container house ⚒️ Owner Builder Learning as I go 💪

item.title: AND THATS A BLOODY WRAP FOR 2025! Honestly what a bloody year, ...
item.description:
AND THATS A BLOODY WRAP FOR 2025! Honestly what a bloody year, yes I did expect to be finished by now but I’ve also come to realise my time perception is shot 🤔 And when I look back on 2025 I was able to complete some pretty big ticket items on a small budget for example even though the window restoration took forever I saved over 70k not buying new! The milling… well actually the whole timber process has felt so long but when I only spent $3k on the timber mill and the timber I milled that was free from my property has a value of $150k-$350k so the argument ‘what is your time worth?’ can’t even be made because I’d take a wage like that any day! 😍 Not to mention of course the 160sqm deck I installed into rock hard clay soil in the peak of summer or the amount of cutting steel I did to take down all the walls and install the window and door cut outs or the welding to weld them all in and the containers together. I can’t forget my DIY fabricated upward opening bedroom door… okay now I think about it were all my jobs big ticket items? 🤔😂 The point is I can say with full confidence I succeeded in my goal of working my butt off until I dropped every night, I only had a small handful of days off for the entire year and I didn’t miss a single week of turning my weekly build efforts into content so I could share it with you! 🥰 I just want to say if you’ve been following the build from the start or if you’ve just arrived thank you for being here, thanks for showing up every week with support and thanks for turning this solo build into what feels like a team build! I couldn’t do it without you! 🥹 I hope you have the most incredible holiday season to end off your 2025 and I can’t wait to welcome you back to my homestead in 2026 so we can wrap up this build as a team! 💪 All my love x
FULL POST | EMBED | REVERSED
